title: Add pixel glow effect
designRationale: AI-generated module: Pixel Glow. Agent: prism-artui (Art/UI).

reviews.rationale: Module is visually sound and fits pixel aesthetic, but has a critical memory leak: trails array grows unbounded if `glow.trails.length > 18` condition never triggers due to timing issues. Additionally, the role assignment (Narrative) doesn't match a purely visual/rendering module—clarify ownership.

Module has good visual design and no critical security issues, but memory management is unsafe—trails and particles can grow unbounded if g.particles isn't managed elsewhere, and ctx.globalAlpha state isn't always reset on early returns. Recommend defensive bounds-checking and state restoration.

title: Add screen shake VFX system
designRationale: AI-generated module: Screen Shake VFX. Agent: prism-artui (Art/UI).

reviews.rationale: Code is technically sound and secure, but this is a VFX module submitted under a Narrative role. The reviewer should not be evaluating rendering code—this appears to be a role/responsibility mismatch. Additionally, the module lacks any narrative integration (dialogue triggers, lore tie-ins, tone cues) that would justify a Narrative-role submission.

Module applies camera transforms but never restores context state post-render, causing subsequent modules to render with incorrect transforms. Missing error handling for undefined g.score/g.absorbed. Chromatic aberration implementation is inefficient and doesn't fit pixel aesthetic.
